project.name: WISDOM App
project.description: Comprehensive child mental health platform for The Ark Centre featuring clinical case management, DSM-5 assessments, room scheduling, payments, WhatsApp messaging, AI-powered insights, and an analytics dashboard.

nodes.label: start-claude-mem.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that starts the Claude-Mem worker service in background using bun, exposes a viewer UI on port 37777.

nodes.label: alembic/env.py
nodes.summary: Alembic environment configuration that imports all SQLAlchemy models for autogenerate support. Configures async migrations using asyncpg with PostgreSQL. Supports both online (async) and offline migration modes.

nodes.label: run_migrations_offline
nodes.summary: Runs Alembic migrations in offline mode with literal SQL binds, configuring context with target metadata and named paramstyle.

nodes.label: run_async_migrations
nodes.summary: Creates an async engine from config, runs migrations synchronously within an async connection, then disposes the engine.

nodes.label: 001_initial_schema.py
nodes.summary: Initial Alembic migration creating the full database schema: users, roles, permissions, child_cases, assessments (sections/domains/questions/options/responses/scores/risk_alerts), case management (assignments/notes/intervention_plans/milestones), scheduling (rooms/bookings/maintenance), payments (invoices/payments), donations (campaigns/donations), messaging (whatsapp/dead_letter), and auth (refresh_tokens/user_attributes/consent_records).

nodes.label: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates all initial database tables for the WISDOM app: 30+ tables covering auth, cases, assessments, scheduling, payments, donations, and messaging. Includes indexes, foreign keys, and JSONB columns.

nodes.label: downgrade
nodes.summary: Drops all tables and indexes created in the initial schema migration in reverse dependency order.

nodes.label: 002_audit_log_protect.py
nodes.summary: Migration adding audit log protection via PostgreSQL triggers (prevents UPDATE/DELETE on audit_logs), the casbin_rule table for RBAC policies, and the system_config table for encrypted configuration values.

nodes.label: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates audit log protection triggers, casbin_rule table for RBAC, and system_config table with encrypted values and unique key constraint.

nodes.label: downgrade
nodes.summary: Drops system_config table, casbin_rule table, audit log triggers and the prevention function.

nodes.label: 003_notifications.py
nodes.summary: Migration adding the notifications table with user_id FK, title, body, type, related resource tracking, and read status. Includes indexes on user_id and is_read.

nodes.label: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates notifications table with UUID primary key, user FK, message fields, related resource tracking, read status, and indexes.

nodes.label: 004_scheduled_notifications.py
nodes.summary: Migration adding the scheduled_notifications table with notification_type, scheduled_at, JSONB payload, status, and indexes on status and scheduled_at.

nodes.label: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates scheduled_notifications table with UUID key, notification type, scheduling datetime, JSONB payload, status, and indexes.

nodes.label: 005_public_content.py
nodes.summary: Migration adding public-facing content tables: public_content (articles/resources/forum posts with slug routing), workshops (with scheduling, capacity, pricing), workshop_registrations, and counselor_profiles (with specializations, languages, bio).

nodes.label: upgrade
nodes.summary: Creates four public-facing tables: public_content (with slug, tags, publishing), workshops (with scheduling, capacity), workshop_registrations, and counselor_profiles. Adds relevant indexes.

nodes.label: downgrade
nodes.summary: Drops counselor_profiles, workshop_registrations, workshops, and public_content tables and their indexes.

nodes.label: user_service.py

nodes.label: list_users
nodes.summary: Returns paginated user list with optional role, status (active/inactive), and search (name/email ilike) filters. Includes user details with role name, activity status, last login, and creation date.

nodes.label: create_user
nodes.summary: Creates a new user with specified role. Looks up role by name, hashes password, creates User record, commits and refreshes with role relationship loaded.

nodes.label: update_user
nodes.summary: Updates user fields via kwargs. Special handling for 'role' field to look up Role by name. Returns updated user with role loaded or None if not found.

nodes.label: deactivate_user
nodes.summary: Sets user.is_active to False. Returns True on success, False if user not found.

nodes.label: force_logout_user

nodes.label: reset_user_password

nodes.label: ai/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Init module for AI feature package covering summarisation, advice, risk detection, and clinical reports.

nodes.label: advice.py
nodes.summary: AI-powered advice generation module using LiteLLM. Provides two functions: generate_parent_advice (compassionate tips for parents at Grade 8 reading level) and generate_intervention_suggestions (evidence-based clinical interventions for staff). Both gather case data, presenting issues, domain scores, and intervention plans as context for LLM prompts.

nodes.label: generate_parent_advice
nodes.summary: Generates compassionate parent advice using LiteLLM. Gathers case presenting issues, latest assessment domain scores, child age/gender as context. Produces 3-5 practical tips at Grade 8 reading level with max 250 words. Gracefully falls back to AI_UNAVAILABLE on error.

nodes.label: generate_intervention_suggestions
nodes.summary: Generates evidence-based therapeutic intervention suggestions for clinical staff using LiteLLM. Gathers case info, presenting issues, diagnosis, domain scores, and existing intervention plan as context. Suggests 3-5 interventions with rationale (TF-CBT, EMDR, play therapy, etc). Max 350 words.

nodes.label: clinical_summary.py
nodes.summary: AI-generated structured clinical summary report using LiteLLM. Gathers comprehensive case data (notes with decryption, all assessment scores, intervention plans, progress milestones) and generates a structured JSON report with sections: presenting_problem, assessment_summary, treatment_progress, risk_indicators, next_steps.

nodes.label: generate_clinical_summary_report
nodes.summary: Generates structured clinical summary report as JSON dict. Gathers all case data: case info, presenting issues, decrypted session notes, all assessment domain scores across time, intervention plans, and progress milestones. Returns dict with keys: presenting_problem, assessment_summary, treatment_progress, risk_indicators, next_steps. Handles JSON parse errors and LLM failures gracefully.

nodes.name: models.py

nodes.name: Assessment
nodes.summary: Top-level assessment entity with title, version, age range, and relationships to sections and domains.

nodes.name: AssessmentSection

nodes.name: AssessmentDomain
nodes.summary: Clinical domain within an assessment (e.g., Domain XII for suicidal ideation) with threshold and safety-critical configuration.

nodes.name: AssessmentQuestion
nodes.summary: Individual assessment question with type (likert, yes/no, multiple choice), domain linkage, and risk flag designation.

nodes.name: AnswerOption
nodes.summary: Predefined answer option for a question with text, numeric value, and ordering.

nodes.name: AssessmentAssignment

nodes.name: AssessmentResponse

nodes.name: QuestionResponse

nodes.name: DomainScore

nodes.name: RiskAlert

nodes.name: extract_tables_from_pdf

tour.title: Entry Points
tour.description: The application has two entry points. The FastAPI backend boots from main.py, which registers all routers and middleware. The Next.js frontend starts from the root layout.tsx, which wraps every page with providers and global styles.

tour.title: Authentication Flow
tour.description: Users authenticate via JWT tokens issued by the auth router. The backend enforces role-based access control (RBAC) through Casbin policies and attribute-based access control (ABAC) for fine-grained permissions. The frontend uses NextAuth.js with custom middleware to protect routes.

tour.title: Case Management
tour.description: The clinical core revolves around cases representing child clients. The case service handles intake, assignment to counselors, session notes, status transitions, and timeline events. The router exposes CRUD endpoints while the models define the SQLAlchemy ORM layer.

tour.title: Assessment Engine
tour.description: Assessments use DSM-5 instruments with configurable scoring rubrics. The scoring module calculates severity levels and triggers P0 safety alerts for critical risk scores. AI-powered parsing can extract assessment data from uploaded PDF reports.

tour.title: Room Scheduling
tour.description: The scheduling module manages room bookings with conflict detection that prevents double-booking. It supports recurring appointments, therapist availability windows, and provides calendar views. The frontend renders an interactive weekly calendar.

tour.title: Payment Processing
tour.description: The payments module generates invoices linked to sessions and processes payments through both Razorpay (for Indian payments) and Stripe (for international cards). Webhook handlers confirm payment status asynchronously. The donations module handles charitable contributions.

tour.title: WhatsApp Integration
tour.description: The messaging module sends WhatsApp notifications via template messages for appointment reminders, assessment alerts, and campaign broadcasts. Failed messages are routed to a dead-letter queue for retry. The notification service orchestrates delivery across channels.

tour.title: AI Features
tour.description: The AI module uses LiteLLM to power clinical summarisation of session notes, automated risk detection from free-text entries, therapeutic advice generation, and clinical report drafting. All AI calls are abstracted behind a unified router with token tracking.

tour.title: Analytics Dashboard
tour.description: The analytics service computes aggregated metrics covering caseloads, assessment trends, scheduling utilisation, and revenue breakdowns. Results are cached in Redis for fast dashboard loading. The frontend renders interactive Recharts visualisations with date-range filters.

tour.title: Public Portal
tour.description: The public-facing portal provides a crisis helpline page, mental health articles with rich content, a counselor matching directory, and a workshop listing. It is designed for parents and the general public to access resources without authentication.
